what_it_does: Defines an SVG icon for a CSV file, showing a document outline with a folded corner and the text label CSV inside it.
observations: Uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no global fill and currentColor stroke.
Draws the document body with a single path from M5 3 through H14, L19 8, V21, H5, Z.
Draws the folded corner with a second path from M14 3 V8 H19.
Places bold CSV text at x=7, y=17 with font-size 4.5, fill currentColor, and stroke disabled.
Uses stroke-width 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
standouts: Combines outline document geometry with an inline text label.
Uses currentColor for both icon stroke and label fill.
conventions: Follows common SVG icon conventions: 24px coordinate system, currentColor styling, rounded strokes, and fill="none".
Uses SVG text rather than converting the CSV label to paths.
concerns: No title, role, aria-label, or other accessibility metadata is present.
The small embedded text may render differently depending on font availability and SVG text handling.
notes: A compact currentColor CSV document icon with folded-corner geometry and an inline CSV label.
questions: Should this icon include accessible labeling metadata?
Is SVG text acceptable for this icon set, or should the label be path geometry?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a CSV file icon, and the SVG content depicts a labeled CSV document icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable CSV file-type icon that inherits surrounding text color and remains visually consistent with stroked outline icons.
novelty: The distinct element in this file is the embedded bold CSV text inside a simple folded-corner document outline.
contribution: Contributes a format-specific file icon substrate: document outline, folded-corner cue, and currentColor CSV label for adaptable UI use.
summary_for_embedding: An SVG file-csv icon with a 24x24 document outline, folded corner, and bold currentColor CSV text label.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing CSV files in an icon system using compact, color-inheriting SVG markup.
